name: Jamey Whitley REALTOR® Shilling Real Estate Co.
description: Jamey Whitley has lived in the Tyler area his entire life and is dedicated to making East Texas a vibrant, engaging place to live. After graduating from Whitehouse High School, Jamey earned a Bachelor’s degree in Journalism with a focus on Public Relations and Advertising from The University of Texas at Tyler. While at UT Tyler, he co-founded Card 53 Comedy, an improvisational comedy group that has been entertaining audiences around East Texas for over 15 years.His work with the City of Tyler's Liberty Hall Theatre sparked a passion for Downtown Tyler’s revitalization, and as a member of Leadership Tyler Class 34, Jamey actively works toward making Tyler an entertainment hub for East Texas. This mission to enhance the local quality of life is what inspired him to become a REALTOR®.Known on social media as “The Funny Real Estate Guy,” Jamey combines his passion for making others laugh with real estate, creating a fun, memorable experience for clients making one of life’s biggest decisions.In 2023, East Texas Real Producers magazine recognized Jamey as their "February Rising Star,” and he was awarded Rookie REALTOR® of the Year by the Greater Tyler Association of Realtors. In 2024, Whitley obtained his Broker's License and became an Associate Broker at Shilling Real Estate. Jamey continues to make an impact in the community he loves—serving on the Board of Directors for the Greater Tyler Association of Realtors and on the Board of Directors for the Whitehouse Education Foundation and Next Step Community Solutions. Visit HomesEastTexas.com for more information.

name: Engenuity Energy
description: Welcome to Engenuity!We utilize building science and renewable energy to optimize your home’s overall performance at every angle. Our holistic approach is what separates us from the rest.Our three core servicesHome Performance Testing - We evaluate your homes energy efficiency, identifying where energy is lost and recommending cost-effective upgrades to improve comfort, reduce bills, and enhance a healthier environment, using tools like blower doors and infrared cameras to pinpoint air leaks and insulation gaps, leading to a prioritized report with potential savings and tax credit info.Battery Systems - We install about 5 different battery options to power your home daily and during outages. We have wall-mounted, ground-mounted, and portable battery options for every budget and need.Solar Energy - We design and install solar systems that fit seamlessly with your lifestyle and goals, helping you generate reliable energy wherever you are. We have roof-mount- ground-mount, and portable solar panel options.What makes us different?At Engenuity Energy, our advantage lies in the way we look at your home as a complete system—not just a collection of parts. We combine advanced testing, proven building science, and tailored solutions to uncover hidden inefficiencies and deliver real, measurable improvements in comfort, air quality, and energy use.Our advantage is especially advantageous as it relates to solar. We firmly believe in our slogan “reduce before you produce”. Most solar companies size systems based only on your current energy consumption. That means if your home is leaking air, wasting conditioned energy, or running inefficiently, you’ll end up needing a larger, more expensive solar array to cover that waste. At Engenuity Energy, we take a different approach. By performing thorough home performance testing before designing your solar system, we identify and eliminate inefficiencies first—tightening up your home, balancing airflow, and optimizing performance. This ensures that when solar is added, your system is correctly sized for your TRUE energy needs, not the waste. The result for you is a smarter investment, lower overall solar cost, greater comfort, and long-term savings. Our VisionOur vision is to lead the shift toward smarter, more efficient living for homes across East Texas.Our MissionOur mission is to help homeowners across East Texas take control of their energy and optimize their living space through building science and renewables— reducing energy waste, increasing home comfort, and creating energy independence.Our Core ValuesFix the System, Not Just the Symptom. We don’t chase surface-level solutions. We trace problems to their root and design fixes that actually work.Every Home is Sacred. A home is more than walls— it’s safety, warmth, and legacy. We treat every home we enter with the respect and care we’d give our own.Power It Forward. We believe energy empowerment is for everyone. From modern families to vulnerable communities, we invest in making reliable, clean, and efficient energy access a reality — one home, one neighborhood, one act at a time.Family is Foundation. From our team to the families we serve, relationships come first. We foster a culture where teammates support each other and clients are treated like kin.We’d love the opportunity to meet you and your homes needs!

We strive to create a sense of peace and well-being, helping individuals connect with the healing power of nature.

name: The Soares Law Firm, PLLC
description: At Soares Law Firm, we believe estate planning is more than just paperwork — it’s about protecting the people and the community you love. Based right here in Tyler, we are proud to serve families across East Texas by making the estate planning process simple, personal, and easy to understand.We know that no two families are the same. That’s why we take the time to listen to your story, understand your values, and create a plan tailored to your unique wishes. Whether you’re planning for your children, supporting aging parents, or building a legacy for future generations, our mission is to ensure that your hard work and love continue to make a difference long after you're gone.At Soares Law Firm, we are honored to walk alongside you, offering guidance, clarity, and peace of mind every step of the way. Because protecting your family’s future isn’t just our profession — it’s our passion and our promise to the community we call home.

name: Mario's Tile and Remodeling
description: Mario’s Ceramic Tile — Craftsmanship You Can Stand On.At Mario’s Ceramic Tile, we believe every tile tells a story — one of craftsmanship, precision, and pride. Serving Tyler, TX and surrounding areas, our team is dedicated to transforming ordinary spaces into extraordinary works of art that last for decades.Whether you’re looking for a luxury bathroom remodel, a stunning new backsplash, or durable flooring that redefines your home, we bring passion and precision to every project. Our services include full tile installations, custom shower builds, ceramic and porcelain tile work, tile repair, and complete bathroom renovations — all completed with unmatched attention to detail.With years of hands-on experience, our expert tile installers deliver top-tier quality, clean finishes, and designs tailored perfectly to your style and budget. We take pride in reliability, communication, and customer satisfaction — values that have earned us the trust of homeowners across East Texas.💬 What sets us apart?✅ Locally owned and operated in Tyler, TX✅ Fully dedicated to craftsmanship, quality, and honesty✅ Free estimates and budget-friendly options✅ Always on schedule, always professionalIf you can dream it, we can tile it.Contact Mario’s Ceramic Tile today and see why we’re the go-to experts for tile installation, renovation, and luxury bathroom design in the Tyler area. 📞 Call or text us today at 903-747-6086

description: At Precision Junk Removal & Hauling, we take the stress out of clearing clutter so you can enjoy a cleaner, more functional space. name: Griffith Law Office
description: The Griffith Law Firm is a team of family attorneys in Tyler, TX led by Rachael Griffith. We are committed to taking the weight of the world off your shoulders. We create a safe environment where your concerns, worries, and desires are heard and fearlessly defended.Many individuals who have worked with family attorneys before have felt unheard and unprioritized. For this reason, open and honest communication is the cornerstone of the Griffith Law Firm. Our staff is warm, understanding, professional, and ready to help you navigate your case.At Griffith Law, we don’t just aim to win a case. We help you regain your footing and empower you to face the future with confidence. Contact us today to discuss your family law case. You have a team of steadfast allies at Griffith Law Firm. You're not alone in this.

description: Veteran Pro Dumpsters is a veteran-owned and operated dumpster rental company proudly serving Tyler, Texas and the surrounding areas. We provide fast and reliable service with competitive pricing for residential, commercial, construction, and cleanup projects of all sizes. Our mission is simple — deliver professional service, dependable solutions, and hassle-free dumpster rentals every time. Whether you’re cleaning out a home, remodeling, roofing, or handling a job site, Veteran Pro Dumpsters is ready to help get the job done right.Veteran Pro Dumpsters also offers Junk Removal. name: Shipley’s Mobile Rv Service
description: Shipley’s Mobile RV Service LLC is a specialized RV repair and maintenance business serving RV owners in and around Lindale, Texas. The company provides both mobile RV repair and in-shop service, giving customers the option to have technicians come directly to their campsite, residence, storage location, or RV park, or to bring the unit into the shop for more extensive work. Its service offering covers core RV systems and structures, including roof repair, electrical work, HVAC service, plumbing, and general maintenance for motor homes, travel trailers, fifth wheels, and toy haulers. The company’s value proposition is convenience-driven: it eliminates the disruption and logistics of towing a large RV to a distant service center while still delivering experienced technical service. Shipley’s differentiates itself through its local ownership, long tenure in business, deep combined technician experience, warranty support coordination, and a 90-day labor warranty that reinforces trust and accountability. Its business model is a regional, service-based operation built on appointment-based repair work, local market coverage, and practical support for RV owners who need dependable maintenance and repair without unnecessary hassle.

name: The Modern Texan
description: The Modern Texan is a boutique furniture refinishing business based in Tyler, TX, where timeless craftsmanship meets modern design. Through our Custom Shop program, clients can bring their own furniture to be customized, refinished, or reimagined with paint, stain, or specialty finishes. We also source vintage and mid-century pieces and transform them into fully personalized, one-of-a-kind statement furniture designed to fit your space and style. Serving Tyler and the greater East Texas area, The Modern Texan provides pickup and delivery for local clients, making it easy to turn your vision into a beautifully finished piece built to last for generations.
